name: Cayenne Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons pecans ground to a fine flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Combine all ingredients, except the pie crust, in a mixing bowl. Beat them together until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the pie shell and bake for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees F and continue baking for another 35 minutes or until set.
5. Cool and serve topped with whipped cream.
Notes: This recipe is deceptively hot, so make it once with these amounts and adjust from there if needed. Use whipped cream to cool down the heat if necessary.
